title: Floating Items Enchanting Table
description: Enchanting Table animations to feel the magic
body:
![Fiet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/912e72014cce10419d822d5588fa266df5639692_0.webp)

## Description
Floating Items Enchanting Table is a vanilla friendly datapack/mod that puts a little animation above the enchanting table

## Important notes
- Compatible with resource packs
- Works normal in survival, but in creative, animations remain after breaking the enchanting table
- Animations are limited to one enchanting table at a time
- The animation in the middle is random (cannot make specific items via datapacks)
- Works fine in multiplayer (only the host needs the mod)

## How it works
To play the animations, just drop exactly 3 lapis lazuli items on top of a enchanting table (you can retrieve it by breaking the same). The animations will play when a player enters the enchanting table's radius
![ex1](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExa2w4ZGdmeWUzbjhtbzVpdDExcnk4ZWp5bjg1MzdoZ21xb3Fyc2x5biZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9cw/GSlJxVFdNTwcuj9Lle/giphy.gif)
## Animations
- Lapis lazuli rise and fall when a player enters the radius
- Lapis lazuli spins and circulates around the enchanting table (take a look, so cool)
- 35 different enchantable items spinning in the middle of the enchanting table
- Lapis lazuli animation is reset when the player enchants an item

## See More:
